name: AT&T Points Plus® Card from Citi
effective_cost: Free, with no annual fee, and can net a recurring statement credit if you already spend $1,000+/cycle

verdict.text: Only useful if you already pay AT&T bills: the bill discount is the value

earn_note: A separate, repeating $20 statement credit is issued each billing cycle you spend $1,000 or more on the card, effectively a standing 2% rebate on top of ThankYou Points once you clear that threshold, but $0 if you stay under it. New cardholders also get a $200 statement credit after $1,000 spend in the first 3 months. No caps found on the bonus-category earning.

redemption_options.method: Gift cards & Shop with Points at checkout
Travel rewards booked through Citi's ThankYou Travel portal

points.per_100k: $1,000, or somewhat more through select travel/gift-card redemptions
points.note: This is base-tier ThankYou Points (not the Premier/Prestige tier), so there's no transfer-partner access. Redemption is capped at roughly 1¢/point via gift cards, merchandise, and the ThankYou travel portal. Points don't expire while the account is open.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer partners on this tier of ThankYou Points: that access is reserved for Citi's premium ThankYou cards (Premier, Prestige), not this no-fee co-brand.

insurance.detail: Not included, a notable gap given this is a phone carrier's own co-branded card
Not confirmed on Citi's public product page for this card
Not confirmed on Citi's public product page for this card

protection_note: A bare-bones standard Mastercard: Citi and third-party reviews both confirm this card carries no purchase protection, extended warranty, travel insurance, or (most notably) cell phone protection, despite being a wireless carrier's own card. Its value is entirely in the AT&T bill discounts and everyday ThankYou Points earning, not in a protection suite.
rental_note: No rental car coverage found for this card.

services.name: AT&T wireless bill discount
services.detail: $10/month discount per eligible wireless line on your AT&T bill, when AutoPay and paperless billing are set to this card.

services.name: AT&T internet bill discount
services.detail: $10/month discount on eligible AT&T internet bills under the same AutoPay/paperless-billing conditions; stacks with the wireless-line discount if you have both services.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: $0 on purchases made outside the US.

services.name: Citi Quick Lock & fraud monitoring
services.detail: Standard Citi account-security tools: lock the card from the app, 24-hour fraud alerts.

additional_cards.title: Authorized users

benefits.text: Earns ThankYou Points on their spend (into your account)
No protections to share: this card doesn't carry a confirmed insurance suite

additional_cards.note: Free to add, useful mainly for pooling household spend toward the recurring $1,000/cycle $20-credit threshold.

timeline.text: AT&T and Citi enhanced the Points Plus Card's bill-discount structure, adding the recurring monthly AT&T internet bill discount alongside the existing per-line wireless discount.
